label: Body type scale
description: A BodyTypeDef-keyed scale entry inside DrawData.bodyTypeScales. Uses custom XML loading where the child element name is the BodyTypeDef defName and its text is the scale value.

bodyType.label: Body type
bodyType.description: BodyTypeDef this scale entry applies to.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Scale multiplier applied when the pawn has this body type.
